notes: Current formulation: Meat From the Grill (contains wheat, gluten; may contain no published item-level cross-contact signal). Frozen: contains wheat, gluten; may contain no published item-level cross-contact signal. The current published display name is Meat From the Grill.

Frozen: contains wheat, gluten, fish, shellfish; may contain no published item-level cross-contact signal. The current published display name is Seafood From the Grill.

The frozen generic JSON parser emitted a descriptionless Mixed Meat child as a standalone menu item. The current ordering surface publishes Meat From the Grill as the configurable parent and no standalone Mixed Meat formulation.
